query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.contactTrustTier, c.crmOrphan, c.rejectedAt, cp.projectId,
  p.name as projectName
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE cp.projectId IN ('450027','990050','960002','90006','330020','330006','180014')
  AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  AND c.crmOrphan = 0
ORDER BY cp.projectId, c.name;

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.contactTrustTier, c.crmOrphan, c.rejectedAt, cp.projectId,
  p.name as projectName
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE cp.projectId IN ('450027','990050','960002','90006','330020','330006','180014')
  AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  AND c.crmOrphan = 0
ORDER BY cp.projectId, c.name;
